response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and any demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains, despite having extensive experience in web, mobile, and open-source technologies using JavaScript, TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js — none of which align with the core technical or domain requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Zero exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
SQL experience is listed but not contextualized in financial systems or enterprise databases like SQL Server/Oracle
